code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] --> ConsentRequested: Customer service request
    
    ConsentRequested --> ConsentPresented: Show consent form
    ConsentPresented --> ConsentGranted: Customer accepts
    ConsentPresented --> ConsentRejected: Customer rejects
    
    ConsentGranted --> ConsentActive: Consent validated & active
    ConsentRejected --> [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream]: Process terminated
    
    ConsentActive --> DataAccess: Provider uses consent
    DataAccess --> ConsentActive: Ongoing data access
    
    ConsentActive --> ConsentModified: Customer modifies scope
    ConsentModified --> ConsentActive: Updated consent active
    
    ConsentActive --> ConsentExpiring: Approaching expiry
    ConsentExpiring --> ConsentRenewed: Customer renews
    ConsentExpiring --> ConsentExpired: Automatic expiry
    ConsentRenewed --> ConsentActive: Renewed consent active
    
    ConsentActive --> ConsentRevoked: Customer revokes
    ConsentExpired --> ConsentArchived: Archive expired consent
    ConsentRevoked --> ConsentArchived: Archive revoked consent
    
    ConsentArchived --> [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode]: End of lifecycle
    
    DataAccess --> AuditLog: Log every access
    ConsentModified --> AuditLog: Log modifications
    ConsentRevoked --> AuditLog: Log revocation
    ConsentExpired --> AuditLog: Log expiry
    
    AuditLog --> ComplianceReport: Generate reports
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业PLC逻辑设计一个完整的客户同意书生命周期状态图。起点应该是PLC逻辑接收到客户服务请求，触发ConsentRequested状态。
明白，PLC作为触发源。那ConsentRequested之后，用户会看到同意书表单对吗？我理解为ConsentPresented状态？
对，展示表单后是ConsentPresented。这里要分叉：客户接受进入ConsentGranted，拒绝则直接终止到TelemetryStream。
好的，已添加分支。ConsentGranted验证后变成ConsentActive，这是核心运行态。我同时把拒绝分支连到TelemetryStream表示流程终止。
ConsentActive需要几条关键流转：正常使用数据访问DataAccess、客户修改ConsentModified、以及即将过期ConsentExpiring。
DataAccess和ConsentActive之间是双向的吗？我理解是持续访问所以能循环回Active？
是的，DataAccess要循环回ConsentActive表示持续访问。另外ConsentExpiring也要分叉：客户续签走ConsentRenewed，自动过期走ConsentExpired。
已添加。ConsentRenewed回到ConsentActive，ConsentActive也能被客户撤销到ConsentRevoked。最后归档状态ConsentArchived应该统一收集过期和撤销的，终点到EdgeNode。
还差审计部分。DataAccess、ConsentModified、ConsentRevoked、ConsentExpired都要记录到AuditLog，然后AuditLog生成ComplianceReport。
确认一下，AuditLog只接收这四个状态的流入，然后单向生成ComplianceReport，不需要回连？
没错，AuditLog是单向汇聚，ComplianceReport是最终输出。这样整个生命周期就完整了。
完成。已添加所有审计流入和报告生成。状态图覆盖了从PLC请求到EdgeNode归档的完整同意书生命周期，包含正常访问、修改、续签、过期、撤销及合规审计。
